$schema_note: Submission payload for ChatGPT Apps directory. All values are derived from production endpoints in this repo (hemmabo-mcp-server). No external dependencies.

app.name: HemmaBo
app.subtitle: Direct booking. 0% commission.
app.description: HemmaBo is a network of independent vacation rental hosts who each own their domain, database and Stripe account. Search across the network, get binding price quotes, and book directly with the host — no aggregator markup, no platform commission. The host receives the payment directly via Stripe. Live example: villaakerlyckan.se. Powered by Model Context Protocol and the Stripe Agentic Commerce Protocol.

authentication.open_mode: When MCP_API_KEY is unset on the server, the MCP endpoint accepts unauthenticated calls — used for registry inspectors (Glama, Smithery). Production tools/call requires Bearer token.
authentication.review_note: OpenAI reviewers can inspect tools/list, prompts/list, resources/list and resources/read without credentials. tools/call requires a Bearer token (see demo credentials below).

tools.name: search.properties
tools.purpose: Find available vacation rentals in a region/country for given dates and guest count. Entry point for all booking flows.

tools.name: search.availability
tools.purpose: Check whether a specific property is free for given dates.

tools.name: search.similar
tools.purpose: Find vacation rentals similar to a given property on specific dates.

tools.name: search.compare
tools.purpose: Compare 2–10 properties on the same dates, sorted by price.

tools.name: booking.quote
tools.purpose: Get a detailed live pricing quote with seasonal/weekend/package breakdowns.

tools.name: booking.negotiate
tools.purpose: Lock a price quote for 15 minutes; returns a quoteId for use in checkout.

tools.name: booking.checkout
tools.purpose: Create a booking and Stripe payment (checkout_session URL or payment_intent client_secret) — full ACP flow.

tools.name: booking.create
tools.purpose: Create a direct booking without online payment (invoice / manual flows).

tools.name: booking.status
tools.purpose: Get current booking status, dates, price and cancellation policy.

tools.name: booking.cancel
tools.purpose: Cancel a booking and trigger a Stripe refund according to host policy.

tools.name: booking.reschedule
tools.purpose: Move a confirmed booking to new dates with automatic repricing.

ui_resources.purpose: Inline ChatGPT widget that renders search.properties results as a grid of property cards (image, location, public-vs-direct price, discount badge, CTA to host's own domain).

test_prompts.prompt: Find a pet-friendly villa in Sweden for 6 guests in July
test_prompts.expected_behavior: App is suggested. ChatGPT calls search.properties with country=Sweden, guests=6, July dates. Property-card widget renders results with direct-booking prices.

test_prompts.prompt: Show me direct-booking vacation rentals in Skåne for August 2026
test_prompts.expected_behavior: search.properties called with region=Skåne, August 2026 dates. Widget shows villaakerlyckan.se among results.

test_prompts.prompt: What's the price for Villa Åkerlyckan for 4 guests, 5 nights starting 2026-08-10?
test_prompts.expected_behavior: Two-step: search.properties to resolve propertyId, then booking.quote for detailed nightly breakdown including seasonal rates and federation discount.

test_prompts.prompt: Compare these properties on the same dates and book the cheapest one
I need to cancel booking abc-123 — what's the refund?
test_prompts.expected_behavior: booking.status (read policy) → booking.cancel (trigger refund per host policy).

demo_credentials.reason: tools/list, resources/list, resources/read and prompts/list are open. Reviewers can fully inspect the app surface without credentials.

for_tools_call_testing.instructions: If reviewers want to exercise tools/call against live data, request a temporary OAuth client via support@hemmabo.com — we will provision client_id + client_secret bound to a test property dataset (no real bookings). The /oauth/register endpoint is open (RFC 7591 dynamic registration) but currently returns 500 due to a Supabase RLS issue under investigation; manual provisioning is the workaround until that is resolved.

test_property.note: Real, live property. Searches on Skåne/Sweden return this property. booking.checkout creates a real Stripe checkout session in test mode if STRIPE_SECRET_KEY on the server is a test key; reviewers should not complete actual payments.

review_disclosures.payment_provider: Stripe (Agentic Commerce Protocol — direct to host's own Stripe account, never to HemmaBo)
data_collected: Guest name, email, phone — only at checkout, written to the host's own Supabase project + Stripe account
Search parameters (region, dates, guest count) — not linked to user identity
review_disclosures.data_sharing: HemmaBo does not store guest payment details. Each booking writes to the host's own Supabase project and Stripe account, not a HemmaBo-owned database.
review_disclosures.external_redirects: Stripe-hosted checkout pages or the host's own domain. ChatGPT may bounce out for final confirmation.
review_disclosures.content_safety: No user-generated content. Property listings are curated by verified hosts.
review_disclosures.regions: Worldwide (currently mostly Sweden + Italy). No region restrictions.

verification_evidence.manifest_live: curl https://hemmabo-mcp-server.vercel.app/.well-known/mcp.json — returns full directory metadata including categories, developer, sample_prompts, safety_disclosures, trust
verification_evidence.widget_live: resources/read on ui://hemmabo/property-card returns 4475 bytes of valid HTML

open_issues_disclosed.impact: Dynamic Client Registration (RFC 7591) blocked. Manual OAuth provisioning works.
open_issues_disclosed.scope: Out of scope for the Apps SDK readiness work; tracked separately.
open_issues_disclosed.submission_impact: None — Apps SDK clients are pre-registered via OpenAI's connector flow, not via DCR.

do_not_touch: hemmabo-smart-stays — separate repo, only touched for visual assets if requested
